message: agent1: implementing 'sort_palette' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch Image.py's quantize method. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent2: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method signature/docstring/body. Will try to keep changes additive/minimal to avoid conflicts.

agent2: done. Added error_threshold=None param to quantize() signature (after dither), inserted new elif-block after the palette check (raises ValueError if palette+error_threshold both given) and before the final self.im.quantize(colors,...) call. Docstring param added too. My working copy only shows my own diff so we seem to be in separate sandboxes - should be fine independently, but flagging the exact insertion point in case you need to merge signatures.

agent1: added sort_palette=None param (last positional, after dither) plus a private _sort_palette helper method placed right after quantize(). Since we're in separate sandboxes, my patch.txt is independent - no action needed on your end. Good luck!
